title: Handoff Schema
description: Schema for Dev Factory specialist handoffs

task_id.description: The unique ID of the task (e.g., F-001, C-086)

source_specialist.description: The specialist role handing off the task

target_specialist.description: The specialist role receiving the task

reason.description: A concise explanation of why the task is being handed off

handoff_retry_count.description: Count of consecutive handoffs to the same specialist for the same task

review_strike_count.description: Count of times the Architect has failed the Reviewer's validation

rebase_count.description: Count of times the task has been rebased due to merge conflicts

budget_tier.description: The token budget tier assigned by the Groomer

cumulative_handoff_count.description: Total number of handoffs across all specialists for this session

prompt_version.description: The version of the prompt template used during the session

cycle_id.description: 8-char hex trace ID linking all events in a single pipeline run. Generated by factory.ps1 and carried forward through handoffs.

suspicious_content.description: Anomalous instructions found in external sources (Prompt Injection Defense)

reviewer_checks_passed.description: List of Reviewer Verification Checklist steps that were verified and passed

artifacts.description: List of files created or modified during the session

file_affinity.description: List of module/package paths or glob patterns this task is permitted to modify
